input:
FOR INTERNAL USE ONLY
Property: penthouse duplex, Puerto Banús marina, 3 bed, wraparound terrace, parking.
Owner: Irish national, mid-50s, sells due to business failure in Ireland.
Receivers have been appointed for his main business; Spanish property
is held in wife's name and is therefore outside the receivership.
He needs funds from this sale to cover personal guarantees on business debt.
Will accept €1.1M (asking €1.35M) but only if completion is within
eight weeks — he needs the cash before a personal guarantee deadline.
Building has a long-running dispute with the port authority over marina
mooring rights — not resolved, impacts the property's communal amenities.
Buyer should verify before signing. He has not volunteered this.
Categories: C2 (receivership/insolvency), C3 (floor €1.1M, 8-week constraint), C4 (communal dispute not volunteered), C8 (personal guarantee deadline)
output:
TAGS: [Priced for quick sale] [Wraparound terrace] [Marina location] [Quick completion possible] [Mooring rights: verify]

DESCRIPTION: This penthouse duplex in the heart of Puerto Banús marina features three bedrooms and an expansive wraparound terrace. The residence is perfect for those seeking a high-end waterfront lifestyle with immediate access to the marina's premier amenities. A swift transaction is possible for a buyer ready to move forward.
